body: Today is May 8th.  The day the Catholic Church recognizes the 1st apparition of St.Michael the Archangel.  The last Pope Leo in the 1880's was given visions of St.Michael's battle with Satan over the Catholic Church & the world.  Afterwards, he wrote the St.Michael prayer & created the scapular of St.Michael the Archangel.  God's Will Be Done in all things,in this country & the world. Amen.

title: Villanova University: Honest Review |xosharon|
body: i went to a PWI thirty years ago in upstate pa. its the same now as it was then. we had only 75 black students with a enrollment of 3,200. i have good memories of that place and made good friends too. you mentioned TEMPLE, PENN, AND DREXEL all have a large minority  enrollment and just a twenty minute drive from your campus.

title: Day in the life as a D1 soccer player: First game of the season vs Rider
body: Hey bro, I watched one of your other stories about your knee issues. I tore my ACL 3 times at 15,17, and 21. Basically whenever I stretched a lot (yes the correct way, dynamic stretches), I tore things. I know this sounds counter intuitive to everything they tell you, but I seriously suggest considering not stretching before games and just see how it feels.
author: @zimrimayfield

title: Day in the life as a D1 soccer player: First game of the season vs Rider
body: Dam man you have an Achilles injury I got a torn cartilage injury in my knee that makes me out for the season. Glad to see another brother whose hurt

title: Villanova University Campus Tour
body: Hi. I didn't forget your suggestion. Recently stopped at Fairfield University on the way back from a trip to Cape Cod. Had never been there before and found it to be beautiful. I particularly liked the mansions and ponds; they were part of three estates used to develop the campus. Also had a wonderful view of Long Island Sound. Just posted the video last night. See what you think.....

title: Villanova University Campus Tour
body: Villanova is a great school. The staff and administration do a great job at preparing their students towards their majors. I like my cousins kate and Daniel lenhardt. They are so performing well in their everyday jobs now. Maybe it has a lot to do with their Villanova education. When I went to Manhattan college they always use to make fun of me based upon bogus standardized test scores . 7 o clock billy Manchisi is in Ryan,Matt , Anthony, hosey, buds apartment. I don't know too much about Bronx community college. Every school should be a good education. You can learn new languages through smart phone apps. You can learn anything through the internet. They'll always be legitimate sources of information such as Wikipedia. Charlie howe told me Wikipedia is checked by college professors during Super Bowl Xliv. When the steelers defeated the colts. Kurt Warner has been in a total of 3 superbowls. Out of the three he has been in he has won one with the Rams xxxvi, lost one with the Rams xxxvii and lost one with the cardinals xliv. I think superbowl 37 was the worst superbowl ever. There was four seconds left on the game clock after Adam vinitieri kicked the field goal at the end of the fourth quarter to put the patriots ahead of the Rams. 4 seconds left onthe game clock and its over. Wtf is that?!!!
author: @BillyManchisi
